records.ety: [L. effigies, fr. effingere to form, fashion; ex + fingere to form, shape, devise. See Feign.]

defs: The image, likeness, or representation of a person, whether a full figure, or a part; an imitative figure; -- commonly applied to sculptured likenesses, as those on monuments, or to those of the heads of princes on coins and medals, sometimes applied to portraits.
